name: plugpressco/plugpress-sdk
description: PlugPress SDK — self-hosted updates, licensing, telemetry opt-in, deactivation feedback, and About page for WordPress plugins.

components.updater: PlugPress_Updater  — self-hosted update checker (skip when Freemius/WP.org owns updates)
components.license: PlugPress_License  — license key activation/validation (gated on pro:true + updater:true)
components.feedback: PlugPress_Feedback — deactivation reason modal on plugins.php
components.about: PlugPress_About    — About / Beta Hub admin page
components.notices: PlugPress_Notices  — shared dismissible admin notice helper
